description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house is surrounded by a concrete driveway and several mature trees, providing a landscaped and welcoming appearance. The front facade features a small porch with steps, flower beds, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. The roof is dark gray, contrasting with the light-colored exterior walls, and the property includes a detached garage or shed at the rear. Outdoor furniture and garden elements are visible in the backyard, suggesting a family-oriented residential setting. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of North American ranch-style homes.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, driveway, porch, and surrounding trees, featuring symmetrical windows and a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance with porch, flower beds, and several trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, detached garage or shed, and additional trees around the property.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, outdoor furniture, and more trees, with the driveway and garage visible to the side.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the house, porch, and a clear arrangement of trees and landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, flower beds, and a single front door, flanked by windows and sheltered by a roof overhang.
